_comment: Topic config for Feature Upvote triage. Goal: separate real product ideas from support-service complaints.
definition: A real idea is a concrete product/functionality request, workflow improvement, report/export need, UX change, configuration enhancement, or capability gap in Colppy. A support complaint is primarily about response time, bad support quality, no human response, chat/IA frustration, or requests to be contacted, without a clear product change request.
false_positives: Pure complaints about support quality/response speed
Requests for someone to call/reply with no product request
General frustration messages without actionable feature request
Messages that only say support is bad / no one answers
true_positives: Asks to add/modify a field, filter, rule, report, export, or behavior
Requests specific workflow changes in facturas, tesoreria, remitos, etc.
Asks for new configuration options (days, defaults, validations)
Describes a concrete feature gap and expected product behavior

few_shot_examples.conversation_snippet:
[Customer]: Title: FACTURA
Description: Agregar en el formulario un campo para número de orden de compra y más campos para trazabilidad con CRM.

classification.reasoning: Concrete request to add new invoice fields and improve traceability.

few_shot_examples.conversation_snippet:
[Customer]: Title: Filtrado
Description: Necesito filtrar y ordenar por descripción en la tabla de facturas.

classification.reasoning: Specific request for filtering/sorting behavior in an existing workflow.

few_shot_examples.conversation_snippet:
[Customer]: Title: AGENTES DE RECAUDACION IIBB
Description: Que el reporte sea compatible con ARBA sin edición manual.

[Customer]: Title: SOPORTE EN LINEA QUE RESPONDA EN EL DIA
Description: Quitar IA y que soporte responda el mismo día.

classification.reasoning: This is primarily a support-service complaint, not a product feature request.

few_shot_examples.conversation_snippet:
[Customer]: Title: QUIERO QUE EN EL CHAT CONTESTEN CON MAS FRECUENCIA
Description: Hace días que no contestan.

classification.reasoning: Pure response-time complaint without concrete product change.

few_shot_examples.conversation_snippet:
[Customer]: Title: Mostrar más filas de ítems por defecto
Description: Visualizar mínimo 10 renglones al cargar facturas.

classification.reasoning: Concrete usability/default configuration improvement in invoice entry UI.
